title: koanophyllon reversum
intro_study: According to "Current pharmaceutical design", koanophyllon reversum benefits, as part of the Geranium genus, have been found to possess various therapeutic properties due to its biological activities, which have been scientifically validated through studies.
side_effects: Koanophyllon reversum can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can lead to cardiovascular problems, including rapid heartbeat, high blood pressure, and even cardiac arrest. In addition, improper use of the plant can cause allergic reactions, such as hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using Koanophyllon reversum for any health benefits to avoid these potential side effects.
